question.label: Highest-leverage work
question.name: When you say 'highest-leverage work,' what work are you pointing to specifically?
question.description: Pins down the concrete work he believes would count as higher leverage before moving deeper into evidence.

answer: I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.

assessment.note: He cannot name team-specific Principal-level work and says the bar feels fuzzy, which is a strong negative clarity signal.

new_queue.label: Team bar fuzzy
new_queue.name: This team's bar feels fuzzy — where does that show up most concretely?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Evidence of leverage
new_queue.name: What recent decision or change best shows the leverage you're creating?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Expectation alignment
new_queue.name: Where do you still need earlier alignment on expectations?

new_queue.label: Questioning pattern
new_queue.name: What keeps you from asking more questions earlier?

new_queue.label: Earlier signals
new_queue.name: What would help you spot expectation drift earlier next time?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
